examples: The secondary oocytes from Saanen dairy goats and 4-32 cell embryos from Shaanbei black goats were used as cytoplast donors and karyoplast donors respectively.
We first observed that the head ofmature tentacle contained transfer cells which were pellet shape, thickness cytoplast, large nucleolus, developing endoplasm, small vacuole and thick cell wall.
The paper mainly reviewed several factors on influencing somatic cloning of pigs, which involve in cytoplast recipients, donor cells, micromanipulation, activation and reconstituted embryo transfer.
